name: @litedrop/api-types
description: Shared litedrop API contract — types generated from the backend OpenAPI spec.

scripts.openapi:check: openapi-typescript ../../apps/backend/openapi.json -o .openapi-check.d.ts && diff .openapi-check.d.ts src/schema.d.ts && rm -f .openapi-check.d.ts && echo 'schema.d.ts is in sync.'
